components.headline: Book service or plan your visit
components.body: Baird Automotive keeps the next step simple: call the shop, review services, or map your route to the Arlington location.

components.title: Baird Automotive shop details
paragraphs: Baird Automotive is located at 3427 Washington Blvd., Arlington, VA 22201, with weekday hours from 8:30am to 6:00pm.
The shop also notes key drop, late pick-up, and easy access from the Virginia Square and Clarendon Metro stations.

metadata.description: Baird Automotive is one of Arlington's most established automotive repair shops, having served Northern Virginia and the surrounding areas for nearly two decades.

components.headline: Established Arlington auto repair with long local roots
components.subheadline: Baird Automotive serves Northern Virginia drivers with diagnostics, maintenance, and honest repair guidance built around long-term customer relationships.

components.alt: Front view of the Baird Automotive shop
components.caption: Front view of the Arlington repair shop.

components.title: Welcome to Baird Automotive
components.lead: Baird Automotive is one of Arlington's established repair shops, built on professionalism, respect, and honest communication.
paragraphs: Baird Automotive stands as one of Arlington's most established automotive repair shops, serving Northern Virginia and the surrounding area for two decades.
The shop builds long-term relationships by treating customers with professionalism, respect, and honesty instead of turning service into a transaction.
Joey Baird's philosophy is simple: treat customers the way he would want to be treated, with enough maintenance education to reduce repair costs now and later and keep driving worry-free.

components.headline: Featured recognition from Washingtonian and Angie's List
components.body: Recognition from Washingtonian Magazine and Angie's List reinforces the shop's long-term reputation for dependable work.

components.alt: Angie's List Super Service Award badge
components.caption: Angie's List Super Service Award badge.

items.title: Hours of operation
items.body: Monday through Friday, 8:30am to 6:00pm, with key drop and late pick-up available.

items.title: Schedule an appointment
items.body: Call (703) 527-1770 to schedule service.

items.title: Recommended links
items.body: Nearby resources include Al's Towing, Extreme Details, County Transmissions, Collision Specialists of Fairfax, and Redtop Cab.

items.title: Car care tip
items.body: Clear sunroof drain tubes every fall so clogged tracks do not send water into expensive electrical modules.

components.headline: Recommended local automotive contacts
components.body: Keep nearby service partners and transportation options within easy reach.

components.headline: More recommended local resources
components.body: Keep trusted transmission and collision partners close at hand.

components.headline: Transportation around the shop
components.body: Redtop Cab offers another transportation option while your vehicle is in the shop.

metadata.description: All about the Baird Automotive team and their many successes.

components.headline: Built on loyal customers and decades of shop experience
components.subheadline: Baird Automotive's story spans its 1992 opening, repeat recognition in regional publications, and a team with more than 100 years of combined experience.

components.alt: The Baird Automotive team standing together
components.caption: Baird Automotive team photo.

components.title: How the shop tells its story
components.lead: Baird Automotive opened on August 3, 1992 and grew by keeping loyal customers as vehicle technology changed.
paragraphs: The business has adapted with automotive technologies while keeping the same customer dedication it had on day one.
Repeated recognition from Washington Consumers' CHECKBOOK Magazine, Washingtonian Magazine, and Angie's List signals a reputation built over many years rather than overnight.
Those awards sit alongside a team with more than 100 years of combined experience, ongoing training, and a customer-first approach to diagnostics and repair.
Joey Baird's philosophy centers on treating people the way he would want to be treated and educating customers so future repair costs stay lower.

items.title: Joey Baird
items.body: With 40 years of experience, Joey's biography covers an early 1955 Chevy build, Lincoln Technical Institute training, ASE Master Technician certification, GM training, emissions diagnosis, and yearly ongoing classes.

items.title: Carlton Powell
items.body: Carlton brings 24 years of experience, prior work at several Northern Virginia shops, and tenure at Baird Automotive dating back to 1997.

items.title: Daniel (Jesse) Smith
items.body: Jesse brings 27 years of experience, time teaching auto mechanics, work at local shops, ASE Master Technician status, and ongoing technical seminars since joining the shop in 2004.

items.title: Fred Swainson
items.body: Fred brings 33 years of experience spanning automotive sales, a rental car business, and the repair work he has focused on since joining Baird Automotive in 2007.

items.title: Shop opening date
items.body: Baird Automotive opened on August 3, 1992.

items.title: Combined experience
items.body: The team brings more than 100 years of combined automotive experience.

items.title: Joey outside the shop
items.body: Joey is positioned as an Arlington native whose competitive, hands-on mindset reinforces the shop's local roots and no-shortcuts service culture.

components.headline: Need service after reading the shop history?
components.body: Review services, schedule an appointment, or contact the shop directly.

metadata.description: Description of services offered at Baird Automotive.

components.headline: Full-service repair for domestic, Asian, and European vehicles
components.subheadline: Baird Automotive says its technicians handle scheduled maintenance, repair work, performance problems, check engine lights, and electrical diagnostics for a broad mix of vehicles.

components.title: Full-service repair and maintenance
components.lead: Baird Automotive offers full-service scheduled maintenance and repairs for most domestic, Asian, and European vehicles.
paragraphs: Technicians focus on performance issues, including check engine lights and electrical diagnostics, while remaining ready to help with a broad range of repair needs.
The service pitch is split into three ideas: newer diagnostic technology, traditional service with customer education, and pride in getting the job done right the first time.

components.title: How the shop frames its approach

items.title: Modern technology
items.body: Technicians work with up-to-date diagnostic equipment and training in the newest technologies.

items.title: Traditional service and professionalism
items.body: The team takes time to educate customers about repairs and about how to maintain their cars now and in the future.

items.title: Experts who take pride in their work
items.body: Baird Automotive takes pride in getting the job done right the first time and making customer satisfaction the highest priority.

components.alt: Small service image representing modern diagnostic technology
components.caption: Supporting service image focused on modern diagnostic technology.

components.alt: Small service image representing customer education and professionalism
components.caption: Supporting service image focused on customer education and professionalism.

components.alt: Small service image representing expert repair work
components.caption: The third supporting image accompanies the shop's pride-in-work message.

items.title: Scheduled maintenance
items.body: Services include extended warranty work, scheduled maintenance, and oil and filter changes.

items.title: Brake, exhaust, and cooling work
items.body: Brake service, including ABS, plus exhaust systems and radiator service and replacement are all included.

items.title: Comfort and drivability systems
items.body: Heating and air conditioning, steering and suspension, and transmission service are all listed.

items.title: Electrical and performance diagnosis
items.body: Check engine lights, electrical and electronic systems, engine repair, and starting and charging support are included.

items.title: Drivetrain services
items.body: Baird Automotive lists axle and driveshaft repair for RWD and 4WD vehicles, clutch repair, differential service, and four-wheel drive systems.

items.title: Tire services
items.body: Computerized alignment, tire balancing and rotation, and wheel mounting are all available.

items.title: For customers
items.body: The amenities list includes discounted car rental rates, a comfortable waiting area, computerized repair records, key drop, Metro accessibility, and nearby restaurants and shopping.

components.alt: Virginia emissions certified repair facility logo
components.caption: Virginia emissions certification branding.

components.headline: Ready to schedule service?
components.body: Call directly to schedule service and confirm your next appointment.

metadata.description: Community is important to the Baird Automotive team.

components.headline: Community support is part of the Baird Automotive identity
components.subheadline: The community page focuses on local schools, kids' programs, Arlington events, and endurance-sport sponsorships tied to Joey Baird and the shop.

components.title: Community involvement
components.lead: Baird Automotive supports the Arlington community through local schools, youth programs, and annual events.
paragraphs: Support includes Arlington's Little League Rookie Team, the Cardinals, along with annual Arlington events that help local businesses while bringing neighbors together.
It also supports endurance-sport and outdoor groups connected to Joey Baird's own interests, giving the community page a more personal tone than a generic sponsorship list.

components.alt: Joey Baird with a bicycle on the In the Community page
components.caption: Joey Baird with a bicycle.

components.title: Community groups and programs named on the page

items.title: Events and sponsorships
items.body: Fight For the Cure for MS, EX2 Adventures, Tri Team Z, and Potomac River Running all appear in the first outbound-link section.

items.title: Local school programs
items.body: Arlington Little League Rookies, Arlington Science Focus School, Arlington Montessori House, Yorktown High School, and Washington Lee High School are all listed.

items.title: Weekly and annual events
items.body: Clarendon Flea Market and Farmer's Market, Taste of Arlington, Clarendon Mardi Gras Parade, and the CSC Invitational Bike Race are all called out.

items.title: Local links

items.question: How do I reach the shop?

items.answer: Monday through Friday, 8:30am to 6:00pm, with key drop and late pick-up available.
